sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
				SELECT id, code, scope, active, priority
				FROM $table_name
				WHERE scope IN ($scopes_format) $extra_where
				ORDER BY priority, id",
				$scopes
			),
			'ARRAY_A'
		)

sinks.expression: wp_die( esc_html__( 'You are not authorized to access this page.', 'code-snippets' ) )

printf( '
%s
', esc_html__( 'Loading edit page…', 'code-snippets' ) )
printf( '%s', esc_attr( $active_tab ) === $section['id'] ? ' nav-tab-active' : '', esc_attr( $section['id'] ), esc_url( add_query_arg( 'section', $section['id'] ) ), esc_html( $section['title'] ) )

printf( '

', esc_attr( sanitize_key( $notice ) ) )
printf( '%s', esc_url( $action_url ), esc_html( $action_label ) )
printf( '%s', esc_url( wp_nonce_url( add_query_arg( $meta_key, $notice ), $meta_key ) ), esc_html__( 'Dismiss', 'code-snippets' ) )

printf(
					'<a class="%s %s-tab" href="%s">',
					$nav_tab_inactive ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-inactive' : 'nav-tab',
					esc_attr( $type_name ),
					esc_url( add_query_arg( 'type', $type_name, $current_url ) )
				)

printf(
				'<a class="nav-tab nav-tab-inactive %s-tab" href="%s" target="_blank" aria-label="%s">%s',
				esc_attr( $type_name ),
				esc_url( 'https://codesnippets.pro/pricing/' ),
				esc_attr__( 'Find more about Pro (opens in external tab)', 'code-snippets' ),
				esc_html( $label )
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
				SELECT id, code, scope, active, priority
				FROM $table_name
				WHERE scope IN ($scopes_format) $extra_where
				ORDER BY priority, id",
				$scopes
			),
			'ARRAY_A'
		)

printf(
					"<option %s value=''>%s</option>\n",
					selected( $query, '', false ),
					esc_html__( 'Show all tags', 'code-snippets' )
				)

printf(
						"<option %s value='%s'>%s</option>\n",
						selected( $query, $tag, false ),
						esc_attr( $tag ),
						esc_html( $tag )
					)
printf( '<input type="hidden" name="%s" value="%s" />', esc_attr( $var ), esc_attr( $value ) )
printf( ' %s', esc_url( $add_url ), esc_html__( 'Perhaps you would like to add a new one?', 'code-snippets' ) )

printf(
						esc_html( $text ),
						esc_html( trim( str_replace( $matches[0], '', $s ) ) ),
						intval( $matches['line'] )
					)
printf( ' %s', esc_url( remove_query_arg( array( 's', 'tag', 'cloud_search' ) ) ), esc_html__( 'Clear Filters', 'code-snippets' ) )
printf( '', esc_url( "https://codesnippets.cloud/images/plugin-icons/$category-logo.png" ), esc_attr( $category ) )

printf(
									'<a href="%s" title="%s" class="cloud-snippet-preview thickbox" data-snippet="%s" data-lang="%s">',
									'#TB_inline?&width=700&height=500&inlineId=show-code-preview',
									esc_attr__( 'Preview this snippet', 'code-snippets' ),
									esc_attr( $item->id ),
									esc_attr( Cloud_API::get_type_from_scope( $item->scope ) )
								)
printf( '%s %s', esc_html__( 'Codevault:', 'code-snippets' ), esc_url( sprintf( 'https://codesnippets.cloud/codevault/%s', $item->codevault ) ), esc_html( $item->codevault ) )

printf(
		'<input id="cloud-snippet-%s-%s" class="cloud-snippet-item" type="hidden" name="%s" value="%s" />',
		esc_attr( $column_name ),
		esc_attr( $snippet->id ),
		esc_attr( $column_name ),
		esc_attr( $snippet->$column_name )
	)

printf(
			'<input id="%s" type="text" name="%s" value="%s" class="regular-text %s">',
			esc_attr( $this->element_id ),
			esc_attr( $this->input_name ),
			esc_attr( $this->get_saved_value() ),
			esc_attr( $this->element_id )
		)

printf(
			'<input type="number" name="%s" value="%s"',
			esc_attr( $this->input_name ),
			esc_attr( $this->get_saved_value() )
		)

printf(
				'<option value="%s"%s>%s</option>',
				esc_attr( $option ),
				selected( $option, $saved_value, false ),
				esc_html( $option_label )
			)

printf(
			'<button type="submit" name="%s" class="button">%s</button>',
			esc_attr( $this->input_name ),
			esc_html( $this->label ? $this->label : $this->name )
		)
printf( ' %s', esc_url( __( 'https://codesnippets.pro/beta-testing/feedback/', 'code-snippets' ) ), esc_html__( 'Share feedback', 'code-snippets' ) )

printf( '

%s %s

', esc_html( $info[0] ), esc_url( $info[2] ), esc_html( $info[1] ) )
printf( '<input type="hidden" name="type" value="%s">', esc_attr( sanitize_text_field( wp_unslash( $_REQUEST['type'] ) ) ) )

printf( '

%s

', wp_kses( $result_messages[ $result ], $result_kses ) )
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
				"
				SELECT id, code, scope, active, priority
				FROM $table_name
				WHERE scope IN ($scopes_format) $extra_where
				ORDER BY priority, id",
				$scopes
			)

esc_js(
					sprintf(
						'return confirm("%s");',
						esc_html__( 'You are about to permanently delete the selected item.', 'code-snippets' ) . "\n" .
						esc_html__( "'Cancel' to stop, 'OK' to delete.", 'code-snippets' )
					)
				)
esc_html( sprintf( __( 'Code Snippets requires PHP %s or later.', 'code-snippets' ), $required_php_version ) )
wp_kses( __( 'Thank you for testing this beta version of Code Snippets. We would love to hear your thoughts.', 'code-snippets' ), [ 'span' => [ 'class' => [ 'highlight-yellow' ] ] ] )
wp_kses( __( 'Upgrade to Pro', 'code-snippets' ), [ 'span' => [ 'class' => true ] ] )
